title: romanToInt
goal: Create src/roman.mjs exporting function romanToInt(s) converting an uppercase Roman numeral (I, V, X, L, C, D, M) to its integer value, honoring the subtractive pairs IV, IX, XL, XC, CD, CM.
notes: Golden must stress each subtractive pair (IV=4, IX=9, XL=40, XC=90, CD=400, CM=900) and a compound (e.g. MCMXCIV=1994). Visible can test III=3 and IV=4.
